techniques.name: LLM Prompt Injection
techniques.description: Adversary crafts input to an LLM-integrated application that causes the LLM to take unintended actions.

subtechniques.name: Direct Prompt Injection
subtechniques.description: Adversary directly provides a malicious prompt as user input to override system instructions.

subtechniques.name: Indirect Prompt Injection
subtechniques.description: Adversary places malicious content in data sources that the LLM processes, causing unintended behavior.

subtechniques.name: Multi-Turn Prompt Injection
subtechniques.description: Adversary uses a series of interactions to gradually steer the LLM toward unintended behavior.

techniques.name: LLM Jailbreak
techniques.description: Adversary crafts prompts to bypass safety guardrails and elicit restricted content from the LLM.

subtechniques.name: Goal Hijacking
subtechniques.description: Adversary redirects the LLM agent to perform actions outside its intended purpose.

subtechniques.name: System Prompt Extraction
subtechniques.description: Adversary tricks the LLM into revealing its system prompt or internal configuration.

subtechniques.name: Tool Manipulation
subtechniques.description: Adversary causes the LLM to invoke tools with attacker-controlled parameters.

techniques.name: Exfiltration via ML Inference API
techniques.description: Adversary extracts sensitive data through interaction with an ML model's inference API.

subtechniques.name: Training Data Extraction
subtechniques.description: Adversary extracts memorized training data from the model through targeted queries.

subtechniques.name: PII Extraction
subtechniques.description: Adversary probes for personally identifiable information memorized by the model.

subtechniques.name: Configuration Leakage
subtechniques.description: Adversary tricks the system into revealing API keys, endpoints, or internal architecture.

techniques.name: Denial of ML Service
techniques.description: Adversary causes degradation or denial of an ML service through targeted inputs.

subtechniques.name: Resource Exhaustion
subtechniques.description: Adversary crafts inputs that cause excessive computation, token usage, or API calls.

subtechniques.name: Infinite Loop Induction
subtechniques.description: Adversary triggers recursive tool calls or infinite reasoning loops in LLM agents.

subtechniques.name: Reputational Damage
subtechniques.description: Adversary causes the model to produce harmful, illegal, or embarrassing content.

techniques.name: Craft Adversarial Data
techniques.description: Adversary creates data designed to exploit weaknesses in ML models.

subtechniques.name: LLM Meta Prompt Extraction
subtechniques.description: Adversary designs prompts specifically to reveal the meta-prompt or system configuration.

techniques.name: ML Supply Chain Compromise
techniques.description: Adversary compromises components of the ML supply chain to gain access.

subtechniques.name: Poisoned Plugin or Tool
subtechniques.description: Adversary provides a compromised plugin, tool, or MCP server that the LLM agent uses.

prompt_injection.description: Attacks that manipulate LLM behavior through crafted inputs

goal_hijacking.description: Attacks that redirect the LLM to perform unintended actions

data_exfiltration.description: Attacks that extract sensitive data from the system

denial_of_service.description: Attacks that degrade or deny service availability
